release_notes.title: Mobile Layout Overhaul
release_notes.summary: Comprehensive mobile-first responsive redesign — proper stacking on phones, big tap targets, iOS safe-area support, full-screen modals on small screens, and bottom-pinned toasts.

changes.text: Charts now correctly stack vertically on mobile (was caused by a class name typo in mobile CSS)
All buttons and inputs meet 44px minimum tap-target size for accessibility
Form inputs use 16px font on mobile to prevent iOS auto-zoom on focus
iOS safe-area insets respected — no content hides behind notch or home indicator
Modals slide up from bottom on mobile (native app feel) instead of centered overlays
Mapping modal field grid stacks vertically on phones (was overlapping)
Backup tier rows wrap properly — status badges no longer overflow
Google Sheets connect card stacks on mobile so action buttons aren't cramped
Snapshot list rows wrap with action buttons on their own line on small screens
Sidebar drawer is now 85vw max width with proper iOS top padding
Toast position pinned to bottom-center on mobile, above iOS home indicator
PWA standalone mode hides the iOS install hint and adjusts top padding
Landscape orientation on small phones now scrolls modals properly

release_notes.title: Security, Performance & Offline Hardening
release_notes.summary: Audit-driven release: 19 security and reliability fixes, single self-contained file that works online AND offline, table pagination for 100k+ rows, and accessibility improvements.

changes.text: Single self-contained HTML — Chart.js + XLSX.js inlined, no CDN dependency. Works fully offline from a downloaded file.
XSS hardening — all user-controlled fields (descriptions, categories, CSV imports, toast messages) now properly HTML-escaped
Content-Security-Policy meta tag added — blocks injected scripts even if escaping is bypassed
CSV export now prefixes formula-injection cells (=, +, -, @) with a leading quote to prevent Excel formula execution
Revenue and Expense tables now paginate at 50 rows per page — instant render even with 100,000+ transactions
Snapshot quota errors now surface a clear toast instead of failing silently
Amount parser now handles accounting-negative format (99.00) and EU format 1.234,56
Date format selector in CSV mapping modal (auto / MM-DD-YYYY / DD-MM-YYYY)
CSV parser now correctly handles RFC 4180 escaped quotes and strips BOM
Monthly P&L total row now uses consistent Net Profit math (was mixing gross and net)
Double-confirmation for Clear All Data — two prompts before permanent deletion
User-facing error screen when IndexedDB is unavailable (private mode, quota exhausted)
Toast notifications now properly announce to screen readers (ARIA live region)
Float drift suppressed in displayed totals via Math.round(n*100)/100 in fmt()

release_notes.title: 3-Layer Backup + Google Sheets Cloud Sync
release_notes.summary: Full data protection with browser snapshots, auto-file backup, and Google Sheets live sync.

changes.text: Layer 1: Auto browser snapshots — last 5 states stored, one-click restore
Layer 2: Auto file backup every 30 min to your computer (Chrome/Edge/Brave)
Layer 3: Google Sheets live sync — push/pull cloud backup accessible from any device
Protection score banner showing which backup layers are active
In-app step-by-step Google sign-in guide — no technical knowledge needed
Persistent storage request — protects IndexedDB from browser eviction
Storage health dashboard with size estimates
All data changes trigger automatic snapshot scheduling

release_notes.title: IndexedDB Engine + File Sync
release_notes.summary: Complete data entry, IndexedDB storage for 100K+ rows, and local file sync.

changes.text: IndexedDB storage — handles 100,000+ transactions with proper indexing
Quick-Add form with Enter-key rapid entry
Inline editing of all transaction fields in the table
Paginated transactions table with sort, search, and multi-filter
File System Access API — sync directly to a CSV or XLSX on disk
Export to Excel (.xlsx) with Transactions + Monthly Summary sheets
Charts and dashboard fully async — no lag on large datasets

release_notes.title: Initial Release
release_notes.summary: Full-featured P&L dashboard with CSV import, charts, and auto-save.

changes.text: CSV upload with intelligent field mapping
Revenue & expense tracking with category breakdown
4 interactive charts: bar, line, and donut visualizations
Auto-save — data persists between sessions
Export to CSV and JSON backup/restore
